sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48868" key="qi/ghma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θίγ-ημα</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῐ], <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n48868.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">touch</tr_>, prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">φιλήματα</foreign> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.209</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Strat.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
